description: Distinct fleet options from merged well index.
sql: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT fleet_name AS label, fleet_name AS value FROM (VALUES ('Alpha 1H','Alpha 1','Fleet Alpha','Pad A-1',101,'42-001-0001',6), ('Alpha 2H','Alpha 2','Fleet Alpha','Pad A-1',102,'42-001-0002',6), ('Alpha 3H','Alpha 3','Fleet Alpha','Pad A-2',103,'42-001-0003',5), ('Bravo 1H','Bravo 1','Fleet Bravo','Pad B-1',201,'42-002-0001',6), ('Bravo 2H','Bravo 2','Fleet Bravo','Pad B-1',202,'42-002-0002',4)) AS w(name, well_family, fleet_name, pad_name, well_id, api_num, stage_count) ORDER BY label ) q
